name: paralog_family_mhc
description: Major Histocompatibility Complex on chr6p21.3 (~3.6 Mb). Class I (HLA-A, -B, -C, plus -E, -F, -G) and Class II (HLA-DRA, -DRB1/3/4/5, -DQA1, -DQB1, -DPA1, -DPB1) genes belong to several paralog families with extreme allelic polymorphism (>30000 HLA alleles in IPD-IMGT/HLA). Paralogous class I A/B/C share ~70-90% nucleotide identity in exons 2-3 (the peptide-binding groove); class II DRB copies share >95% identity. Short-read mapping notoriously collapses paralogs; long-read or PSV-aware mapping is required. CHM13 provides a single haplotype; population mapping should consult the MHC pangenome.
